---
title: "purpose 1"
format: html
editor: visual
message: false
warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages

library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(bit64)
library(janitor)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(rstanarm)
library(bayesplot)
library(tidybayes)
library(tidymodels)
library(bayesrules)
library(broom.mixed)
```
